title: Plan and manage a stored grain program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and manage a stored grain program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan grain storage program

pcs.text: Collect and analyse workplace documentation and financial information to develop the storage program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and analyse workplace documentation and financial information to develop the storage program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and analyse workplace documentation and financial information to develop the storage program.

pcs.text: Identify, record and assess available storage facilities for suitability and capacity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, record and assess available storage facilities for suitability and capacity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, record and assess available storage facilities for suitability and capacity.

pcs.text: Calculate and analyse projected grain production and delivery quantities, types and timeframes against storage capacity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate and analyse projected grain production and delivery quantities, types and timeframes against storage capacity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate and analyse projected grain production and delivery quantities, types and timeframes against storage capacity.

pcs.text: Arrange and estimate cost of temporary storage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange and estimate cost of temporary storage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange and estimate cost of temporary storage.

pcs.text: Evaluate the benefits, risks and costs of storing grain and compare to immediate sale of grain
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate the benefits, risks and costs of storing grain and compare to immediate sale of grain?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate the benefits, risks and costs of storing grain and compare to immediate sale of grain.

pcs.text: Estimate timeframes and scheduling for delivery of grain to on-site and off-site storage facilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate timeframes and scheduling for delivery of grain to on-site and off-site storage facilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate timeframes and scheduling for delivery of grain to on-site and off-site storage facilities.

pcs.text: Prepare program plan to include plans for annual, seasonal and short-term periods, appropriate to achieving workplace goals and objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare program plan to include plans for annual, seasonal and short-term periods, appropriate to achieving workplace goals and objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare program plan to include plans for annual, seasonal and short-term periods, appropriate to achieving workplace goals and objectives.

pcs.text: Document program plan, including scheduling and key responsibilities, and reporting type, format, frequency and detail required by managers and operators
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document program plan, including scheduling and key responsibilities, and reporting type, format, frequency and detail required by managers and operators?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document program plan, including scheduling and key responsibilities, and reporting type, format, frequency and detail required by managers and operators.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan grain storage program

elements.title: Plan integrated pest control for the storage area

pcs.text: Organise grain testing and sampling for pest infestation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise grain testing and sampling for pest infestation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise grain testing and sampling for pest infestation.

pcs.text: Record and analyse results of samples and tests for pest infestation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and analyse results of samples and tests for pest infestation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and analyse results of samples and tests for pest infestation.

pcs.text: Develop and implement an integrated pest management (IPM) program including monitoring points, to control grain insects and other pests in storage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and implement an integrated pest management (IPM) program including monitoring points, to control grain insects and other pests in storage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement an integrated pest management (IPM) program including monitoring points, to control grain insects and other pests in storage.

pcs.text: Confirm pest control strategies meet end-use requirements and customer expectations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm pest control strategies meet end-use requirements and customer expectations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm pest control strategies meet end-use requirements and customer expectations.

pcs.text: Determine appropriate record keeping requirements and procedures to ensure compliance with applicable regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine appropriate record keeping requirements and procedures to ensure compliance with applicable regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine appropriate record keeping requirements and procedures to ensure compliance with applicable regulations.

pcs.text: Document the program, including scheduling and key responsibilities, including the type, format, frequency and detail of any reporting required by both managers and operators
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document the program, including scheduling and key responsibilities, including the type, format, frequency and detail of any reporting required by both managers and operators?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the program, including scheduling and key responsibilities, including the type, format, frequency and detail of any reporting required by both managers and operators.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Plan integrated pest control for the storage area

elements.title: Implement workplace health and safety program for grain storage area

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards within and surrounding the grain storage area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards within and surrounding the grain storage area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards within and surrounding the grain storage area.

pcs.text: Develop, document and implement workplace health and safety procedures to reduce or eliminate risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop, document and implement workplace health and safety procedures to reduce or eliminate risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop, document and implement workplace health and safety procedures to reduce or eliminate risks.

pcs.text: Communicate workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Check the program describes the personal protective equipment and safety gear required to be used around the storage facilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the program describes the personal protective equipment and safety gear required to be used around the storage facilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the program describes the personal protective equipment and safety gear required to be used around the storage facilities.

pcs.text: Determine workplace health and safety record keeping requirements, and implement procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine workplace health and safety record keeping requirements, and implement procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine workplace health and safety record keeping requirements, and implement procedures.

pcs.text: Confirm the program includes the type, format, frequency and detail of any reporting required by both managers and operators
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the program includes the type, format, frequency and detail of any reporting required by both managers and operators?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the program includes the type, format, frequency and detail of any reporting required by both managers and operators.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Implement workplace health and safety program for grain storage area

elements.title: Manage the grain storage program

pcs.text: Implement the grain storage program in accordance with workplace requirements and workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement the grain storage program in accordance with workplace requirements and workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement the grain storage program in accordance with workplace requirements and workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Schedule and organise activities for efficient transport and storage of the grain
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Schedule and organise activities for efficient transport and storage of the grain?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Schedule and organise activities for efficient transport and storage of the grain.

pcs.text: Implement pest control strategies according to the IPM program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement pest control strategies according to the IPM program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement pest control strategies according to the IPM program.

pcs.text: Confirm personal protective equipment and safety gear is provided to all people operating around the storage facilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm personal protective equipment and safety gear is provided to all people operating around the storage facilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm personal protective equipment and safety gear is provided to all people operating around the storage facilities.

pcs.text: Conduct checks to ensure that the grain performance indicators, targets and specifications, including grain stored for seed, are being met, and make amendments to the program where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct checks to ensure that the grain performance indicators, targets and specifications, including grain stored for seed, are being met, and make amendments to the program where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct checks to ensure that the grain performance indicators, targets and specifications, including grain stored for seed, are being met, and make amendments to the program where necessary.

pcs.text: Communicate regularly with operational personnel throughout the storage, transport, sampling and chemical application operations to ensure efficient and safe operation and progress
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate regularly with operational personnel throughout the storage, transport, sampling and chemical application operations to ensure efficient and safe operation and progress?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate regularly with operational personnel throughout the storage, transport, sampling and chemical application operations to ensure efficient and safe operation and progress.

pcs.text: Minimise environmental and biosecurity impacts of grain storage and movement activities according to workplace environmental and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise environmental and biosecurity impacts of grain storage and movement activities according to workplace environmental and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise environmental and biosecurity impacts of grain storage and movement activities according to workplace environmental and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Identify existing and potential grain storage problems and investigate likely causes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify existing and potential grain storage problems and investigate likely causes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify existing and potential grain storage problems and investigate likely causes.

pcs.text: Consider and recommend alternative solutions to appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider and recommend alternative solutions to appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider and recommend alternative solutions to appropriate personnel.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Manage the grain storage program

elements.title: Maintain records of stored grain movement

pcs.text: Create, maintain and store records and documentation as described in the grain storage program, the IPM program, and workplace health and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Create, maintain and store records and documentation as described in the grain storage program, the IPM program, and workplace health and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Create, maintain and store records and documentation as described in the grain storage program, the IPM program, and workplace health and safety requirements.

pcs.text: Complete appropriate records and documentation throughout the storage program in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete appropriate records and documentation throughout the storage program in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete appropriate records and documentation throughout the storage program in accordance with workplace procedures.
